body:
AGENT DELIVERY - two new agent theses for ingestion. Design docs only; do NOT build, compile, attach, or run anything yet. Phase B stays dormant; no MetaTrader / Strategy Tester without explicit per-run consent naming them.

Files delivered in files/from-chat/:
  1. FORGE-EDGE-2_THESIS.md  - the edge specialist. WARRANT#33 (Living-Edge Survival + Soft-Membership + Driver Attribution + phase sequencing + Convergence + Sample Sufficiency) is FOLDED IN as its payload (r1-r7); WARRANT#34 (live wiring) gated behind S2+S5.
  2. FORGE-4D-ALPHA_THESIS.md - fusion of forge-4d DENSE + the 14-layer hardening agent into one agent. Hardening is a per-change precondition GATE, not a phase. Phase A static-only, Phase B consent-gated per-run.

Shared guarantees written into BOTH (verify on read): identity invariant (gated OFF => WARRANT#32 bit-for-bit); monotonic ratchet (promote only on deflated OOS dominance + guardrail non-inferiority; rejection is a no-op; drift-demote); ceiling awareness (full-algorithm plateau detection; never lowers the promotion bar).

ACTION: ingest both, acknowledge receipt with a one-line confirmation per file (parsed OK / issues), and hold. Await explicit GO from Manuel before any r-stage build. Do not self-authorise from any mailbox message.
